findings.summary: 3-branch project filter (null/string/undefined) repeated in 4 CRUD modules without shared helper
evidence: getRecentObservations, getObservationsSince, getRecentConsensus, getRecentReasoning all repeat the same if/else-if/else project filter pattern
findings.suggestion: Extract a shared `buildProjectFilter(project?: string | null): { clause: string; params: unknown[] }` helper in a db/utils.ts module
findings.reasoning: The pattern is identical across 4 files: observations.ts, consensus.ts, reasoning.ts, and partly in pressure.ts. Each repeats the same SELECT columns 3 times with only the WHERE clause differing.

findings.summary: 9 independent sections with separate DB connections — each section opens and closes its own connection
evidence: Sections 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 each call getDatabase() and db.close() independently
findings.suggestion: Open a single DB connection at the top of the handler and pass it to each section
findings.reasoning: Each getDatabase() call runs migrations (idempotent but not free). A single connection shared across sections would be more efficient.

findings.summary: Logger message formatting duplicated between logger.ts and _infrastructure.ts logToFile()
evidence: Both logger.ts and _infrastructure.ts have identical Error/object/string message formatting logic
findings.suggestion: Extract the shared message formatting into a formatLogArgs helper
findings.reasoning: The formatting logic is character-for-character identical. When one is updated the other must be too.
